text: case_load_and_capacity - Ituri CTE saturation reached 87.0% with an estimated gap of about 20 isolation centers. - Response: Accelerate CTE construction and expansion and deploy additional temporary isolation structures.

text: contact_followup_gap - Contact follow-up reached 72.8% versus the 95% target (a 22.2 pp gap). - Response: Train, deploy, and motivate community relays (RECO) with reinforced supervision.
